languages.text: "Эти сами по себе не опасны, Погонщица ими пути преграждает. Толстые, плотные. Когда ломаешь такую, осторожным надо быть, она вся в шипах. Не так ударил, обязательно напорешься. Ну и поторапливаться надо, на ней порезы заживают быстро". {n}Иждриг протягивает ладонь, на которой вы видите шрам от сквозного ранения. Видимо, тем самым шипом.{/n}

"They're not dangerous in themselves, but the Drover uses them to block a path. They're thick and dense. Watch yourself when you're smashing them — they're bristling with thorns. Strike it the wrong way and you're sure to get skewered. And you have to hurry, any cuts in it heal quickly." {n}Izdrig holds out his palm, displaying a scar from a wound that went right through. Clearly the work of one of those thorns.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Эти сами по себе не опасны, Погонщица ими пути преграждает. Толстые, плотные. Когда ломаешь такую, осторожным надо быть, она вся в шипах. Не так ударил, обязательно напорешься. Ну и поторапливаться надо, на ней порезы заживают быстро". {n}Иждриг протягивает ладонь, на которой вы видите шрам от сквозного ранения. Видимо, тем самым шипом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Those are not dangerous in themselves, but the Drover uses them to block the way. They're thick and dense. Watch yourself when you're smashing those; they're bristling with thorns. Strike it the wrong way and you'll definitely run yourself into them. And you have to hurry — the cuts on it heal quickly." {n}Izdrig holds out his palm with a scar from a piercing wound. Clearly the work of one of those thorns.{/n}

"They're not dangerous in themselves, but the Drover uses them to block a path. They're thick and dense. Watch yourself when you're smashing them — they're bristling with thorns. Strike it the wrong way and you're sure to get skewered. And you have to hurry, any cuts in it heal quickly." {n}Izdrig holds out his palm, displaying a scar from a wound that went right through. Clearly the work of one of those thorns.{/n}

"They're not dangerous in themselves, but the Drover uses them to block our way. And they're thick, dense. They may not seem frightening to you, but having our usual routes cut off is a problem for us. And the creature doesn't let us off without a little surprise, either — when we cut through the barricade, the creature spits out a cloud of poisonous spores. Charming, isn't it?"

"Those are not dangerous in themselves, but the Drover uses them to block the way. They're thick and dense. Watch yourself when you're smashing those; they're bristling with thorns. Strike it the wrong way and you'll definitely run yourself into them. And you have to hurry — the cuts on it heal quickly." {n}Izdrig holds out his palm with a scar from a piercing wound. Clearly the work of one of those thorns.{/n}

Clearly the work of one of those thorns.{/n}

Strike it the wrong way and you're sure to get skewered. And you have to hurry, any cuts in it heal quickly." {n}Izdrig holds out his palm, displaying a scar from a wound that went right through. Clearly the work of one of those thorns.{/n}

languages.text: 「バリケード自体は危険ではないが、ドローバーはそれで私たちの進路を塞ぐ。分厚くて密だ。閣下には恐ろしいものには見えないかもしれないが、いつもの経路を断たれるのは私たちには大問題だ。そしてあの化け物は、ただでは済ませてくれない。バリケードを切り開くと、毒の胞子の雲を吐き出してくる。魅力的だろう？」
languages.original_text: "They're not dangerous in themselves, but the Drover uses them to block our way. And they're thick, dense. They may not seem frightening to you, but having our usual routes cut off is a problem for us. And the creature doesn't let us off without a little surprise, either — when we cut through the barricade, the creature spits out a cloud of poisonous spores. Charming, isn't it?"

traits.locale_text: 「バリケード自体は危険ではないが、ドローバーはそれで私たちの進路を塞ぐ。分厚くて密だ。閣下には恐ろしいものには見えないかもしれないが、いつもの経路を断たれるのは私たちには大問題だ。そしてあの化け物は、ただでは済ませてくれない。バリケードを切り開くと、毒の胞子の雲を吐き出してくる。魅力的だろう？」

languages.text: « Elles ne sont pas dangereuses en elles-mêmes, mais leur épaisseur et leur densité permettent au Chasseur de s'en servir pour nous barrer la route. Méfiez-vous de leurs épines quand vous vous attaquerez à elles. Au moindre faux pas, elles vous embrocheront à coup sûr. Et surtout, ne perdez pas de temps, car les blessures que vous leur infligerez se refermeront rapidement. » {n}Izdrig tend sa paume ouverte pour vous montrer la cicatrice laissée par l'une de ces épines, qui lui a transpercé la main de part en part.{/n}
languages.original_text: "They're not dangerous in themselves, but the Drover uses them to block a path. They're thick and dense. Watch yourself when you're smashing them — they're bristling with thorns. Strike it the wrong way and you're sure to get skewered. And you have to hurry, any cuts in it heal quickly." {n}Izdrig holds out his palm, displaying a scar from a wound that went right through. Clearly the work of one of those thorns.{/n}

Méfiez-vous de leurs épines quand vous vous attaquerez à elles. Au moindre faux pas, elles vous embrocheront à coup sûr. Et surtout, ne perdez pas de temps, car les blessures que vous leur infligerez se refermeront rapidement. » {n}Izdrig tend sa paume ouverte pour vous montrer la cicatrice laissée par l'une de ces épines, qui lui a transpercé la main de part en part.{/n}

languages.text: "Kendi başlarına tehlikeli olmasalar da Çoban, onları yolları kapatmada kullanıyor. Kalın ve yoğunlar. Parçalarken dikkat etmeli... Dikenden geçilmiyorlar. Yanlış şekilde vurmak, şişlenmekle sonuçlanır. Acele etmezseniz de açtığınız kesikler iyileşir." {n}Avcunu uzatan İzdrig, onu delip geçmiş bir yaranın izini gösteriyor. Belli ki o dikenlerden birinin işi.{/n}
languages.original_text: "They're not dangerous in themselves, but the Drover uses them to block a path. They're thick and dense. Watch yourself when you're smashing them — they're bristling with thorns. Strike it the wrong way and you're sure to get skewered. And you have to hurry, any cuts in it heal quickly." {n}Izdrig holds out his palm, displaying a scar from a wound that went right through. Clearly the work of one of those thorns.{/n}

Yanlış şekilde vurmak, şişlenmekle sonuçlanır. Acele etmezseniz de açtığınız kesikler iyileşir." {n}Avcunu uzatan İzdrig, onu delip geçmiş bir yaranın izini gösteriyor. Belli ki o dikenlerden birinin işi.{/n}

languages.text: «No son peligrosas por sí mismas, pero el Pastor las usa para bloquear el camino. Son muy espesas. Tenga cuidado al golpearlas; están erizadas de espinas. Si ataca por donde no debe, acabará {mf|ensartado|ensartada}. Y más vale que se dé prisa, porque los cortes se cierran casi al instante». {n}Izdrig extiende la palma de la mano para mostrarte la cicatriz de una herida que la atravesó limpiamente. Obra de una de esas espinas, sin duda.{/n}
languages.original_text: "They're not dangerous in themselves, but the Drover uses them to block a path. They're thick and dense. Watch yourself when you're smashing them — they're bristling with thorns. Strike it the wrong way and you're sure to get skewered. And you have to hurry, any cuts in it heal quickly." {n}Izdrig holds out his palm, displaying a scar from a wound that went right through. Clearly the work of one of those thorns.{/n}

Si ataca por donde no debe, acabará {mf|ensartado|ensartada}. Y más vale que se dé prisa, porque los cortes se cierran casi al instante». {n}Izdrig extiende la palma de la mano para mostrarte la cicatriz de una herida que la atravesó limpiamente. Obra de una de esas espinas, sin duda.{/n}

languages.text: “它们本身并不危险，但会阻拦我们的去路。它们又厚又密。砸它们的时候小心点——上面长满了刺。击打的角度不对，就会被扎穿。而且动作得快，它们身上的伤口愈合得很快。”{n}伊兹德里格摊开手掌，露出一道被扎穿的疤痕，显然就是那些刺留下的。{/n}
languages.original_text: "They're not dangerous in themselves, but the Drover uses them to block a path. They're thick and dense. Watch yourself when you're smashing them — they're bristling with thorns. Strike it the wrong way and you're sure to get skewered. And you have to hurry, any cuts in it heal quickly." {n}Izdrig holds out his palm, displaying a scar from a wound that went right through. Clearly the work of one of those thorns.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “它们本身并不危险，但会阻拦我们的去路。它们又厚又密。砸它们的时候小心点——上面长满了刺。击打的角度不对，就会被扎穿。而且动作得快，它们身上的伤口愈合得很快。”{n}伊兹德里格摊开手掌，露出一道被扎穿的疤痕，显然就是那些刺留下的。{/n}

languages.text: "Sie sind an sich nicht gefährlich, aber der Treiber benutzt sie, um uns den Weg zu versperren. Sie sind dick und dicht. Seid vorsichtig, wenn Ihr sie beseitigt ... sie sind voller Dornen. Schlagt Ihr falsch zu, werdet Ihr aufgespießt. Außerdem müsst Ihr Euch beeilen, weil alle Schnitte rasch heilen." {n}Izdrig zeigt dir eine Wunde, die seine Handfläche durchbohrt hat. Eindeutig das Werk einer dieser Dornen.{/n}

Watch yourself when you're smashing them — they're bristling with thorns. Strike it the wrong way and you're sure to get skewered. And you have to hurry, any cuts in it heal quickly." {n}Izdrig holds out his palm, displaying a scar from a wound that went right through. Clearly the work of one of those thorns.{/n}
